title: Asset Interest
description: Captures informal beneficiary interest in an asset or collection — pre-bequest soft preferences. Not legally binding. Helps the testator understand who wants what before making formal bequests

id.description: Unique identifier for this interest record

estateId.description: The estate this interest relates to

assetId.description: Reference to a specific Asset.id, if the interest is in a single asset

collectionId.description: Reference to an AssetCollection.id, if the interest is in an entire collection

personId.description: The person expressing interest (must be a Person.id with a beneficiary role)

interestLevel.description: How strongly the beneficiary has expressed interest
interestLevel.$comment: mentioned = came up in conversation but no strong feeling. expressed_interest = person said they'd like it. strongly_wants = person has made it clear this matters to them. agreed = testator and beneficiary have informally agreed.

sourceType.description: How this interest was communicated or recorded
sourceType.$comment: family_conversation = mentioned during a family discussion. written_request = beneficiary put it in writing. chat_message = expressed via the platform's messaging. proxy_reported = a proxy relayed the interest on behalf of the beneficiary. testator_observed = testator noticed the person's attachment without them asking. manual = entered directly by the testator or proxy.

testatorAcknowledged.description: Whether the testator has seen and acknowledged this interest

examples: Sarah mentioned at Christmas 2024 that she'd love Mum's engagement ring. Mum seemed pleased.
Haruki has always admired the woodblock print collection — discussed at Obon 2024.
Amara expressed strong interest in the family compound during the last family council meeting.
